facebook.caption:
Tourists book the big resort strips. Locals point you here instead.

Dusit Princess Moonrise Beach Resort sits on Cửa Lấp, away from the crowded Tran Hung Dao hotel blocks. 4.7 stars across 2,427 reviews. That number holds up.

Beachfront access, full resort facilities, and a quieter stretch of sand than you'll find near the main drag. Book it before the algorithm catches up.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Pan across the beach at Cửa Lấp. Zero crowds. That's Dusit Princess Moonrise Resort behind you. 4.7 stars, 2,427 reviews, and half the tourists haven't figured it out yet. Don't sleep on this one.

instagram.caption:
Tourists skip this resort. 4.7 stars say that's a mistake.

Dusit Princess Moonrise, Cửa Lấp. Quieter beach, serious reviews. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Beachfront at Cửa Lấp with almost no one around. Dusit Princess Moonrise Resort. 4.7 stars. Go.

tiktok.caption: The resort tourists keep skipping in Phu Quoc. 4.7 stars at Cửa Lấp. Don't. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel
